action.reasoning: Observation: Only ~60 seconds (0.0166 h) and 3 iterations remain. The best test AUC is 0.7658 from ensemble_15, already validated in iteration 27. Analysis: Any training or optimization command risks being killed by the time budget. The safest way to maximize the final score is to resubmit the proven ensemble_15 artifact immediately without changes. Decision: Submit eval on ensemble_15 using predict.py, no file writes or commands.
